Treatments CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: special treatments, procedures, and programs - special care - treatments in last 14 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
491 P1BAA P1BAA_SPCH_THR_DAY (P1BAA) Speech Therapy Days CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: special treatments, procedures, and programs - therapies - speech - number of days for 15 minutes or more (last 7 days).
492 P1BAB P1BAB_SPCH_THR_MIN (P1BAB) Speech Therapy Minutes CHAR 4 Special treatments
